---
title: "U.S. Labor Market Trends (2011-2024)"
author: "Shahlan Finchan"
date: "2026-02-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(writexl)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Loading Table 8 data
t8 <- read_excel(
  "Table_8_Data.xlsx",
  col_types = c("text","text","text","text","text","text","text","text")
)

glimpse(t8)

# Convert all columns from text to numbers
t8 <- t8 %>%
  mutate(across(c(FT_Total, PT_Total, Unemp_FT, Unemp_PT), readr::parse_number))

# Pivot to Tidy Format
t8_tidy <- t8 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(FT_Total, PT_Total, Unemp_FT, Unemp_PT),
    names_to = c("Measure","Time"),
    names_sep = "_",
    values_to = "Count"
  ) %>%
  # Combine Measure and Time info into meaningful columns
  mutate(
    FT = if_else(Measure == "FT" & Time == "Total", Count, NA_real_),
    PT = if_else(Measure == "PT" & Time == "Total", Count, NA_real_),
    Unemp = if_else(Measure == "Unemp", Count, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Year, Sex, Race, Age) %>%
  summarise(
    FT = sum(FT, na.rm = TRUE),
    PT = sum(PT, na.rm = TRUE),
    Unemp = sum(Unemp, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(Total = FT + PT)


glimpse(t8_tidy)



t8_tidy <- t8_tidy %>%
  filter(!is.na(Sex) & !is.na(Race) & !is.na(Age))


t8_tidy <- t8_tidy %>%
  mutate(
    Total = as.numeric(Total),
    Unemp = as.numeric(Unemp)
  )

t8_tidy <- t8_tidy %>%
  mutate(Year = as.numeric(Year))

t8_tidy <- t8_tidy %>%
  mutate(Age = factor(Age, 
                      levels = c("16 to 19","20 to 24","20+","25 to 54","25+","55+"),
                      ordered = TRUE))


write_xlsx(t8_tidy, "Table_8_Data_Tidy.xlsx")

summary(t8_tidy)
```
